description: Remove redundant detectScope() call from processQuestion() — generateSQL() already returns OUT_OF_SCOPE, eliminating one API round-trip per message (Issue #22)

userStories.title: Remove detectScope call from processQuestion, derive isInScope from SQL generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want processQuestion() to skip the separate scope detection step so each message requires one fewer API call.
acceptanceCriteria: detectScope() is no longer called inside processQuestion()
isInScope is true when generateSQL() succeeds; false when generateSQL() returns error 'Question is out of scope'
Out-of-scope response message to the user is identical to before
needsEscalation and escalationReason for out-of-scope questions are unchanged
detectScope() function itself is NOT deleted — remains exported
npm test passes in the backend
